title: sida oblonga
intro: Sida oblonga, also known as the bladder senna, is a plant species in the mallow family Malvaceae, native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. The medicinal properties of Sida oblonga include its anthelmintic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic properties, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds. The health benefits of consuming Sida oblonga include the treatment of urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and other kidney-related disorders, as well as its use as a natural laxative. Sida oblonga is typically prepared as a herbal tea or decoction, and it can also be used in the form of a powder or capsules, after being extracted from the plant's leaves and stems.
